message:
test: pin time.h clock + signal.h kill/raise conformance via differential harness

Adds two harnesses:
- conformance_diff_clock.rs: clock_gettime (5 clocks), clock_getres,
  nanosleep (short + invalid), clock_nanosleep (TIMER_ABSTIME). 6
  tests pass.
- conformance_diff_signal_kill.rs: kill (self/INT_MAX-pid/bad-sig),
  raise (SIGUSR2/bad-sig). Uses sigaction handlers + atomic counters
  to verify delivery. 6 tests pass.

0 divergences across either harness.

Beads: bd-clk1, bd-skill1
